holdings.infoBox: RWIN is an equity ETF with a total of 174 individual holdings. The top holdings are Roche Holding AG stock at 2.90%, Advantest at 2.83%, ASML Holding at 2.31%, AXA SA at 2.16%, and Allianz SE at 1.97%.

overview.description: The Rayliant NxtGen Multifactor International Equity ETF (RWIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund combines active management with quantitative analysis to provide a diversified portfolio of high-quality all-cap developed market equities outside of the US. The ETF aims to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns. RWIN was launched on Apr 7, 2026 and is issued by Rayliant.
